sentences.arabic: تَمْتَازُ الدُّوَلُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ بِإِنْتَاجِ أَنْوَاعٍ كَثِيرَةٍ مِنَ التُّمُورِ.
sentences.translation: Arapske zemlje se odlikuju proizvodnjom mnogih vrsta hurmi.
sentences.translationEn: Arab countries are characterized by producing many types of dates.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ النَّاسُ التَّمْرَ لِلضُّيُوفِ مَعَ الْقَهْوَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi nude hurme gostima uz arapsku kafu.
sentences.translationEn: People offer dates to guests with Arabic coffee.

sentences.arabic: التَّمْرُ غَنِيٌّ بِالْفِيتَامِينَاتِ وَيُفِيدُ صِحَّةَ الْإِنْسَانِ.
sentences.translation: Hurme su bogate vitaminima i koriste ljudskom zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: Dates are rich in vitamins and benefit human health.
